source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Sentry Gun
upgrades.description: Creates temporary sentry guns and deploys them close to track anywhere in radius.

upgrades.name: Faster Engineering
upgrades.description: Increased efficiency allows the Engineer to produce sentries, foam and bloon traps more often.

upgrades.name: Sprockets
upgrades.description: Increases sentry gun and Engineer attack speed.

upgrades.name: Sentry Expert
upgrades.description: Sentries deploy with different damage types based on your need.

upgrades.name: Sentry Champion
upgrades.description: Creates super-powerful but highly unstable sentries.

upgrades.name: Larger Service Area
upgrades.description: Shoots further and deploys sentries in a much larger area. Sentries have longer range.

upgrades.name: Deconstruction
upgrades.description: Nail gun and Sentry shots do extra damage to MOAB-class and Fortified Bloons.

upgrades.name: Cleansing Foam
upgrades.description: Sprays foam that removes Camo and Regrow and pops Lead Bloons.

upgrades.name: Overclock
upgrades.description: Overclock Ability: Target another tower to supercharge its attack speed for a short time.

upgrades.name: Ultraboost
upgrades.description: Ultra-Overclocked Monkeys gain a small but permanent boost every time they are overclocked.

upgrades.name: Oversize Nails
upgrades.description: Massivization allows nails to pop 8 Bloons at once, including frozen. Also increases Foam and Sentry effectiveness.

upgrades.name: Pin
upgrades.description: Pins Bloons in place for a short time when struck.

upgrades.name: Double Gun
upgrades.description: Two guns for twice the fun.

upgrades.name: Bloon Trap
upgrades.description: Bloon trap captures Bloons until full. Select to empty full trap for cash.

upgrades.name: XXXL Trap
upgrades.description: Huge Bloon traps can trap some of the largest Bloons in them...
